title: Comment

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the SourceOS spec this record conforms to.

targetId.description: URN of the object this comment is attached to.

author.description: URN of the subject who authored this comment.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the comment was created.

body.description: Free-text body of the comment (Markdown supported).

description: A human annotation or review note attached to any addressable platform object, supporting collaborative governance and curation workflows.
